Tutorial: Custom Greenhouse Geometry

This tutorial shows how to define any greenhouse geometry by constructing a GreenhouseParams manually.

Example: 50 × 200 m production greenhouse

using GreenhousesJL
using OrdinaryDiffEqTsit5

tmy = load_tmy("path/to/weather.txt")

# Geometry
A     = 50 * 200       # 10 000 m² floor area
h_air = 4.5            # mean height [m]
ϕ     = 22 * π / 180   # 22° roof slope

# Cover: double glass (4 mm + 4 mm, air gap increases R but we model as single node)
ρ_cov, cp_cov, th_cov = 2600.0, 840.0, 0.008   # 8 mm total
C_cov = ρ_cov * cp_cov * th_cov * A / cos(ϕ)
ε_cov = 0.84

# Air
C_air = 1.2 * 1000 * A * h_air

# Floor: 15 cm concrete slab
ρ_flr, cp_flr, th_flr = 2300.0, 880.0, 0.15
C_flr = ρ_flr * cp_flr * th_flr * A
ε_flr = 0.90

# Soil
soil = SoilParams(
    2,      # N_c: 2 concrete sub-layers
    8,      # N_s: 8 soil layers (~10 m total depth)
    1.7,    # λ_c: concrete conductivity [W/(m·K)]
    0.85,   # λ_s: soil conductivity
    2e6,    # ρc_c: concrete volumetric heat capacity [J/(m³·K)]
    1.73e6, # ρc_s: soil volumetric heat capacity
    A,      # area
    283.15, # T_deep: 10 °C deep boundary (warmer climate)
)

# Walls: perimeter × height
L, W = 200.0, 50.0
h_gutter = 3.5
A_walls = 2 * (L + W) * h_gutter   # 1750 m² (small vs 10 000 m² roof)
C_wall = 2600 * 840 * 0.004 * A_walls  # 4 mm glass walls

# Heating: hot water system, PI control
Kp    = 80.0 * A       # 80 W/(m²·K)
Ti    = 600.0           # 10 min
T_sp  = 291.15          # 18 °C
Q_max = 150.0 * A       # 150 W/m² capacity

# Assemble
p = GreenhouseParams(
    A, ϕ, h_air,
    C_cov, ε_cov,
    C_air,
    C_flr, ε_flr,
    soil,
    A_walls, C_wall, 0.3,   # walls: area, capacity, FF_sky
    Kp, Ti, T_sp, Q_max,
    tmy,
)

Checking the configuration

println("State vector size: ", state_size(p))
println("Has walls: ", has_walls(p))
println("Has heating: ", has_heating(p))
println("Soil layers: ", n_soil(p))
println("Wall/roof ratio: ", round(A_walls / (A / cos(ϕ)), digits=2))

Running

u0 = initial_state(p; T0=284.15, T_soil0=283.15)  # 11 °C start
prob = ODEProblem(greenhouse_rhs!, u0, (0.0, 30*86400.0), p)  # 30 days
sol = solve(prob, Tsit5(); reltol=1e-6, saveat=3600.0)
Performance

A 30-day simulation with this 10 000 m² greenhouse completes in ~15 ms. A full growing season (300 days) runs in under 50 ms.
